name: EuiTabbedContent
visualDescription: A combined component showing a horizontal tab bar (EuiTabs) at the top with the selected tab's content panel rendered immediately below it. The active tab has an underline indicator. NOT EuiTabs alone (EuiTabbedContent manages the tab bar and the associated content panel together; EuiTabs is only the bar).

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

autoFocus.description:
When tabbing into the tabs, set the focus on `initial` for the first tab,
or `selected` for the currently selected tab. Best use case is for inside of
overlay content like popovers or flyouts.

expand.description: Evenly stretches each tab to fill the horizontal space

initialSelectedTab.description:
Use this prop to set the initially selected tab while letting the tabbed content component
control selection state internally

selectedTab.description: Use this prop if you want to control selection state within the owner component

tabs.description:
Each tab needs id and content properties, so we can associate it with its panel for accessibility.
The name property (a node) is also required to display to the user.
